cnf(u13,axiom,

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
2. flies_to(susan,lga) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((flies_from(X0,X1) & flies_to(X0,X2)) => X1 != X2) [input(axiom)]
5. ~flies_from(susan,lga) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~~flies_from(susan,lga) [negated conjecture 5]
7. flies_from(susan,lga) [flattening 6]
8. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (X1 != X2 | (~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X2))) [ennf transformation 4]
9. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (X1 != X2 | ~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X2)) [flattening 8]
13. flies_to(susan,lga) [cnf transformation 2]
15. X1 != X2 | ~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X2) [cnf transformation 9]
16. flies_from(susan,lga) [cnf transformation 7]
17. ~flies_from(X0,X2) | ~flies_to(X0,X2) [equality resolution 15]
18. ~flies_to(susan,lga) [resolution 17,16]
20. $false [forward subsumption resolution 18,13]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
